title: After the Takamatsunomiya Kinen: New Me, New Dreams

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Talk about leaving an impression! This is
why I love sprints!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you notice? Nishino Flower's running
looked different than usual...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I've always thought she was fast, but it feels like
she's got more power now. It's almost as if she's
evolving...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The difference in her running should be obvious
to sharp-eyed spectators and critics. Our trial and
error will continue, but right now...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There are still some things that bother me... but I
think I did the best I could.
choice_data_list:
Yeah! You really had an impact—I could
practically feel it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Really? That's a relief...
choice_data_list: Looks like you've got no problems with sprints.
Looks like you've got no problems with sprints.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I agree. I think they're a good fit for me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Should we also make my next race a sprint?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ideally, if she can run slightly longer distances,
she can compete in more graded races and
improve her versatility.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So if she continues to grow both physically and
athletically, it might be a good idea to have her
try that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I announce Nishino Flower's next goal race at the
post-race press conference.
choice_data_list:
Nishino Flower's next goal will be the Milers
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! A mile race?! If she's planning to run the
Milers Cup, then the next race after that must
be...
choice_data_list:
We also intend to have her run in the G1
Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: So she is going after a G1 race! Does she have any plans to run in medium-distance races in the future ?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Hm. I see... Well, Nishino Flower has been
performing excellently so far.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
If she keeps this up, I'm sure both you and Nishino
Flower will be recognized and awarded by the
URA!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list:
We've never even thought about receiving
awards.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Haha. Apologies for suddenly bringing that up. But when you are awarded for your excellence, I hope you'll allow the media to celebrate with you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, of course! Thank you for your support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the press conference comes to an
end.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...An award.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(That's right. It's possible to receive rewards for
doing really well. That would be such a great
honor...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I bet Trainer would be over the moon.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I might even be able to pave the way for
Trainer's future... How amazing that would be...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I might even be able to pave the way for
Trainer's future... That would be amazing...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Now I have a new dream to chase after! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Aha! There you are, Flower! Great job today!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Baku—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I saw your press conference! So you're gonna
keep running mile races, huh? That's a wonderful
goal!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I want to conquer all the different race grades
too, but unfortunately, I'm currently working on
my speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Till we meet again at the Sprinters Stakes in the
fall! See you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
There she comes and goes again, just like a
hurricane. Though ephemeral cherry blossoms
may be her namesake, she certainly carves her
own unyielding path.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Haha. It really does seem that way.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: ...So you're going to take on mile races, Flower?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I want to gradually increase the distance I
can run.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Gradually...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
...So high is the cliff called "distance," and so
sheer is its drop, that even storms shy away in
fear.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Zephyr?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I'll be running in the Milers Cup too. In the sprints
and miles, I shall become the wind, and then...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I will dominate at the front of even
longer-distance races and become a
triple-distance champion.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
...After seeing your press conference, the winds of
my emotions surged in intensity.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
But it seems they have finally regained some
calm...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Zephyr seemed different than usual today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I wonder why...
choice_data_list: Maybe we'll find out at the Yomiuri Milers Cup.
Maybe we'll find out at the Yomiuri Milers Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As curious as I am about the change in Yamanin
Zephyr, we first need to focus on training for our
next goal.
